svg:
<svg id="008-contiguous-memory" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="顺序表连续内存" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">顺序表连续内存</text><text class="text small" x="24" y="64">a1 到 a5 在内存中连续存放。</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="112" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a1</text><text class="text tiny" x="112" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 0</text><rect class="box" x="154" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="196" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a2</text><text class="text tiny" x="196" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 1</text><rect class="box" x="238" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="280" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a3</text><text class="text tiny" x="280" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 2</text><rect class="box" x="322" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="364" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a4</text><text class="text tiny" x="364" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 3</text><rect class="box" x="406" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="448" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a5</text><text class="text tiny" x="448" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 4</text><rect class="box" x="490" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="532" y="139" text-anchor="middle">...</text><text class="text tiny" x="532" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 5</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="70" y="81" width="36" height="8" rx="4"/><text class="text small" x="24" y="222">连续单元表示物理地址相邻，访问时按元素大小跳转。</text></svg>

<svg id="008-address-calc" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="顺序表地址计算" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">顺序表地址计算</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="82" width="620" height="70" rx="10"/><text class="text" x="380" y="126" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22px" font-weight="700">LOC(ai)=LOC(a1)+(i-1)*sizeof(ElemType)</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 120 174 H 640"/><text class="text small" x="90" y="215">起始地址</text><text class="text small" x="310" y="215">位序 i</text><text class="text small" x="530" y="215">元素大小</text></svg>

<svg id="008-static-array" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="静态分配结构" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">静态分配结构</text><text class="text small" x="24" y="64">容量固定，当前长度可变。</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="112" y="139" text-anchor="middle">头</text><text class="text tiny" x="112" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 0</text><rect class="box" x="154" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="196" y="139" text-anchor="middle">A</text><text class="text tiny" x="196" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 1</text><rect class="box" x="238" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="280" y="139" text-anchor="middle">B</text><text class="text tiny" x="280" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 2</text><rect class="box" x="322" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="364" y="139" text-anchor="middle">空</text><text class="text tiny" x="364" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 3</text><rect class="box" x="406" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="448" y="139" text-anchor="middle">C</text><text class="text tiny" x="448" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 4</text><rect class="box" x="490" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="532" y="139" text-anchor="middle">空</text><text class="text tiny" x="532" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 5</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="70" y="81" width="36" height="8" rx="4"/><text class="text small" x="24" y="222">连续单元表示物理地址相邻，访问时按元素大小跳转。</text></svg>

<svg id="008-dynamic-alloc" viewBox="0 0 820 300" role="img" aria-label="动态分配结构" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">动态分配结构</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="137" y1="130" x2="137" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="104" y="164" text-anchor="middle">头</text><text class="text tiny" x="156" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 175 157 H 215"/><rect class="box" x="220" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="287" y1="130" x2="287" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="254" y="164" text-anchor="middle">A</text><text class="text tiny" x="306" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 325 157 H 365"/><rect class="box" x="370" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="437" y1="130" x2="437" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="404" y="164" text-anchor="middle">B</text><text class="text tiny" x="456" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 475 157 H 515"/><rect class="box" x="520" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="587" y1="130" x2="587" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="554" y="164" text-anchor="middle">C</text><text class="text tiny" x="606" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><text class="text small" x="643" y="164">NULL</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="214" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="219">虚线箭头带动画，表示指针方向和遍历过程</text></svg>

<svg id="008-realloc-flow" viewBox="0 0 820 300" role="img" aria-label="动态扩容流程" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">动态扩容流程</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="137" y1="130" x2="137" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="104" y="164" text-anchor="middle">头</text><text class="text tiny" x="156" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 175 157 H 215"/><rect class="box" x="220" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="287" y1="130" x2="287" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="254" y="164" text-anchor="middle">A</text><text class="text tiny" x="306" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 325 157 H 365"/><rect class="box" x="370" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="437" y1="130" x2="437" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="404" y="164" text-anchor="middle">B</text><text class="text tiny" x="456" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 475 157 H 515"/><rect class="box" x="520" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="587" y1="130" x2="587" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="554" y="164" text-anchor="middle">C</text><text class="text tiny" x="606" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><text class="text small" x="643" y="164">NULL</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="214" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="219">虚线箭头带动画，表示指针方向和遍历过程</text></svg>

<svg id="008-random-access" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="随机存取" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">随机存取</text><text class="text small" x="24" y="64">第 i 个元素可直接定位。</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="112" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a1</text><text class="text tiny" x="112" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 0</text><rect class="box" x="154" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="196" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a2</text><text class="text tiny" x="196" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 1</text><rect class="box" x="238" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="280" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a3</text><text class="text tiny" x="280" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 2</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="246" y="89" width="68" height="6" rx="3"/><rect class="box" x="322" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="364" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a4</text><text class="text tiny" x="364" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 3</text><rect class="box" x="406" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="448" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a5</text><text class="text tiny" x="448" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 4</text><rect class="box" x="490" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="532" y="139" text-anchor="middle">...</text><text class="text tiny" x="532" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 5</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="70" y="81" width="36" height="8" rx="4"/><text class="text small" x="24" y="222">连续单元表示物理地址相邻，访问时按元素大小跳转。</text></svg>
